positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical graphic illustration suitable for apparel print. The scene depicts a bioluminescent cosmic forest, featuring interconnected, glowing crystalline flora and swirling, ornate celestial vines. The composition must be central and highly contrasted, utilizing strong negative space. Color palette is dominated by deep midnight blues, indigo, and sapphire, accented by vibrant glowing emerald green and metallic gold highlights. Art style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with minimalist graphic vector art, resulting in clean, scalable, and dramatic silhouettes. Full moon as the central glowing element. Clean lines, high detail, perfect for screen printing.
